technical_hacks_v4: Using Chorus on the sub-bass (120Hz-250Hz range) for 'growling' stereo-movement while keeping <100Hz mono.
Reverse-reverb on the first syllable of each verse to create 'anticipation-drift'.
Applying Bitcrusher(12-bit) to the master limiter input for 'old-school' digital warmth.
Stacking 3 instances of OTT on the Reese-bass with different mix percentages (30%, 15%, 10%) for multi-stage compression.

ASE_system_health_logic.aesthetic_fidelity: Cross-reference generation with 'Golden Record' G# (51.9Hz) frequency profile.
